amplify.domain.CfnAbout: The AWS::Amplify::Domain resource allows you to connect a custom domain to your app.

amplify.domain.AppId.Description: The unique ID for an Amplify app.

amplify.domain.AutoSubDomainCreationPatt.Description: Sets the branch patterns for automatic subdomain creation.

amplify.domain.AutoSubDomainIAMRole.Description: The required AWS Identity and Access Management (IAM) service role for the Amazon Resource Name (ARN) for automatically creating subdomains.

amplify.domain.DomainName.Description: The domain name for the domain association.

amplify.domain.EnableAutoSubDomain.Description: Enables the automated creation of subdomains for branches.
